# Diagram: research/deploy/dev/install_minikube.sh


> Auto-generated by Obscura crawlers

## Mermaid

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  Start([Start]) --> Check{minikube executable found?}
  Check -- Yes --> Installed[echo minikube installed]
  Check -- No --> Update[apt-get update -y]
  Update --> Upgrade[apt-get upgrade -y]
  Upgrade --> Curl[apt-get install -y curl]
  Curl --> AptTransport[apt-get install -y apt-transport-https]
  AptTransport --> VirtualBox[apt install -y virtualbox virtualbox-ext-pack]
  VirtualBox --> Wget[wget https://storage.googleapis.com/minikube/releases/latest/minikube-linux-amd64]
  Wget --> Copy[sudo cp minikube-linux-amd64 /usr/local/bin/minikube]
  Copy --> Chmod[sudo chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/minikube]
  Chmod --> Version[minikube version]
  Version --> Installed
  Installed --> End([End])
```
